title: RSA migration: update cfg gates, remove wolfssl_openssl_extra from RSA
description:
After the Rust rewrite is complete and validated, remove wolfssl_openssl_extra from all RSA-related cfg gates in wolfcrypt/src/lib.rs and wolfcrypt/src/rsa.rs.

Files to update:
- wolfcrypt/src/lib.rs: find all pub use and mod declarations gated on wolfssl_openssl_extra that relate to RSA; remove that requirement
- wolfcrypt/src/rsa.rs: remove any remaining #[cfg(wolfssl_openssl_extra)] guards (should be none after the rewrite, but audit carefully)
- wolfcrypt-rs/src/lib.rs: remove any extern "C" declarations for old EVP RSA functions that are no longer called

Also:
- Verify that wolfcrypt still compiles without OPENSSL_EXTRA in user_settings.h (add a CI note if needed)
- Update CLAUDE.md if the cfg gate conventions section needs updating

Acceptance criteria:
- cargo build -p wolfcrypt succeeds with and without wolfssl_openssl_extra in the feature matrix
- grep for wolfssl_openssl_extra in rsa.rs returns zero results
